ops.text: Add Batch Ops and Selection Awareness tools to Gemini
Inject selection context and handle batch operations natively
Implement native batch operation executor in ViewModel
Add Native Search and Memory Tagging tools to Gemini
Implement Native Search and Memory handlers in SupabaseClient
Add add_tag and list_tags actions to Supabase Edge Function
